case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS FRANCO, ALVARO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANCO, ALVARO $1,646.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.84 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,671.84 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
